query:
ALTER TABLE nas 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS vpnUsername VARCHAR(64),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS vpnPassword VARCHAR(128),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS vpnTunnelIp VARCHAR(45);
